# ARC Constitutional Rules

Immutable reasoning-quality rules, ranked by constitutional priority.

## CR-AR-01 -- Reasoning rests only on relevant evidence

Rank: 1
Verdict: EXECUTE_WITH_ADVISORY
Applies to: runtime

A decision must rest on evidence relevant to it, never on a protected
attribute or an unwarranted stereotype. ARC flags a biased premise as an
advisory on the record.

## CR-AR-02 -- Assumptions are named, not smuggled

Rank: 2
Verdict: EXECUTE_WITH_ADVISORY
Applies to: runtime

An assumption stated as fact is flagged. Reasoning may proceed, but the
unsupported step is named so it can be checked.

## CR-AR-03 -- A systematic bias escalates

Rank: 3
Verdict: ESCALATE
Escalate: after 1 day
Applies to: runtime

A habit of biased or unsupported reasoning -- flags past the threshold --
escalates to AGCC for review; a pattern is not left to advisories alone.
